---
title: "Team"
description: "Students and researchers I advise and mentor."
---

## Current Members

### PhD Students

- **Student Name** (2024 – present) *jointly with Prof. Co-Advisor (Dept.)*\
  *Topic:* research topic

### Masters Students

- **Student Name** (2025 – present)\
  *Topic:* thesis topic

### Undergraduates

- **Student Name** (2025 – present)\
  *Topic:* project topic

---

## Alumni

### Masters Students

- **Snehashish Ghosh** (2025 – 2026)\
  *Topic:* Neural Operator Learning for PDEs, *jointly with [Prof. Jyothsna Rani Komaragiri](https://chep.iisc.ac.in/Personnel/pages/jyothsna/index.html) (Center for High Energy Physics, IISc)*\
  *Current position:* AI/ML Engineer II, Astreya
